'''''Libom''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that carried surveillance probes in the cargo transfer area above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bofa II]].

The freighter was captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] and the probes were modified so that they gave false information about their fleet movements.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
